articles.title: Cardano Massively Dominated Ethereum, Polygon and Seven Altcoins in 2022 on One Metric: Santiment
articles.description: Crypto analytics platform Santiment is revealing that Cardano (ADA) led all other blockchain protocols on one critical metric this year. Santiment says that Cardano had the highest level of development activity in 2022 in the crypto ecosystem ahead of Ethereum (ETH) and other blockchain protocols. articles.title: Donald Trump NFTs Lose Momentum, Declines 80% in 14 Days
articles.description: Donald Trump NFTs are trading at 80% below peak value as floor price have dropped to 0.19 ETH from a peak of 0.84 ETH in two weeks.

articles.title: Dogecoin Has No Plans to Migrate to PoS; Foundation Creates Development Fund
articles.description: Dogecoin's core developer Michi Lumin disclosed that there are no definite plans to move to Proof of Stake for the meme coin.
